title: Deva、Hunedoara — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Deva、Hunedoaraの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

DevaはHunedoaraにある人口61,123の都市です。A city in Transylvania dominated by the ruins of the Deva Fortress atop a volcanic hill, and a gateway to the stunning Corvin Castle in nearby Hunedoara.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
